system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content:
Hello, this is Yusuf Rossi. I recently received my order #W2378156, and I’d like to arrange an exchange for a couple of items. First, the mechanical keyboard I got—I want to swap it for the same model but with clicky switches instead of the current ones. Ideally, it should have RGB backlighting and be full size. If that exact configuration isn’t available, I’m okay with the same keyboard but without backlighting. 

Also, I ordered a smart thermostat that’s compatible with Apple HomeKit, but I actually need one that works with Google Home instead. Could you help me with these exchanges? I want to make sure everything is handled in one go. I’m located in zip code 19122. 

One thing—I don’t remember the email address I used for the order. What information do you need from me to verify my identity and proceed?

Hello Yusuf, to verify your identity and proceed with your request, I need to confirm your user ID. Since you don't remember the email address used for the order, I will use your full name and zip code to find your user ID.

I will now look up your user ID using your name "Yusuf Rossi" and zip code "19122."

Thank you, Yusuf. I have located your user ID as yusuf_rossi_9620.

Next, I will check the details of your order #W2378156 to identify the items you want to exchange and their current configurations.

I have found your order #W2378156 with the following items delivered: headphones, vacuum cleaner, mechanical keyboard, smart thermostat, and smart watch.

The mechanical keyboard you received has linear switches, RGB backlight, and is full size. You want to exchange it for the same model but with clicky switches, preferably with RGB backlighting, or without backlighting if RGB is not available.

The smart thermostat you received is compatible with Apple HomeKit, and you want to exchange it for one compatible with Google Home.

I will now check the product details for the mechanical keyboard and the smart thermostat to find suitable exchange options for you.

For the mechanical keyboard, the exact model with clicky switches, RGB backlighting, and full size is currently not available. However, there is a full size mechanical keyboard with clicky switches and no backlighting available (item id 7706410293). There is also a full size mechanical keyboard with clicky switches and white backlighting available (item id 6342039236).

For the smart thermostat, there is a Google Assistant compatible model in black color available (item id 7747408585).

Please confirm if you want to exchange the mechanical keyboard to either the clicky switch with no backlight (item id 7706410293) or the clicky switch with white backlight (item id 6342039236), and the smart thermostat to the Google Assistant compatible black model (item id 7747408585).

Also, please provide the payment method you want to use for any price difference or refund for the exchange. Your current payment method for the order was a credit card.

Thank you for the information. I’d like to go ahead and exchange the mechanical keyboard for the full size one with clicky switches and no backlighting (item id 7706410293). For the smart thermostat, yes, please exchange it for the Google Assistant compatible black model (item id 7747408585).

Regarding the payment method for any price difference or refund, please continue to use the credit card I originally used for the order.

Since I don’t remember the email address I used, what other details can I provide to verify my identity and proceed with these exchanges?

Thank you for confirming the exchange details:

- Mechanical keyboard: exchange to full size, clicky switches, no backlighting (item id 7706410293)
- Smart thermostat: exchange to Google Assistant compatible black model (item id 7747408585)
- Payment method: original credit card used for the order

You have already provided your full name and zip code, which I used to verify your user ID. This is sufficient for identity verification in this case.

I will now proceed to summarize the exchange details and ask for your final confirmation before processing the exchange request.
To confirm, you want to exchange the following items in order #W2378156:

- Mechanical keyboard (item id 1151293680) to full size, clicky switches, no backlighting (item id 7706410293)
- Smart thermostat (item id 4983901480) to Google Assistant compatible black model (item id 7747408585)

The payment method for any price difference or refund will be the original credit card used for the order.

Please confirm with a "yes" to proceed with the exchange request or "no" to cancel.
Yes, that is correct. Please proceed with the exchange request. Thank you for your help!
